case_title: THE STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION VS. DUSOH SROLES

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SROLES, DUSOH SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-23-2011
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-13-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-13-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: DAWSON, ANGELA C SUBSTITUTED FOR ZIDE, FLINT COREY AS ATTORNEY FOR THE STUDENT LOAN CORPORATION
